title: Browsable changelog screenshots
summary: Changelog screenshots are now a scrollable gallery: click any shot to enlarge it, hover a before/after to flip to the before image, and press and hold to reveal the diff.
highlights: A scrollable row of previews — click one to enlarge it in a lightbox
Hover or focus to flip instantly between after and before
Press and hold to reveal the diff — in the row or the lightbox
